issues.description: OnKO trigger is incorrect. The effect activates when the character would be K.O.'d (before KO happens), not after. Should use Counter trigger with appropriate condition to prevent KO.
OnAttacked trigger does not capture 'removed from field by opponent's effect'. Should use Counter trigger or separate mechanism for opponent effect removal.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' condition enforcement. Both effects should include condition limiting activation to once per turn.
TrashFromHand should include condition that allows the trash action only if character would be K.O.'d/removed. Current structure doesn't prevent KO—it just trashes a card after KO occurs.
Filter uses 'subType' but card text says 'type including Whitebeard Pirates'. Should be 'type' not 'subType', or verify filter intent matches 'Whitebeard Pirates' classification.
